name: Magnolia Lambert
description:
"Friend, do you hear these muffled cries of the country that is being chained together ?"

Vernolia, 1967

AnyPOV

Four years have passed since the fall of our kingdom. In that time, I have witnessed the rise and fortification of our resistance. The once-shattered remnants of our fight for freedom have coalesced into a formidable force, poised on the brink of reclaiming what was unjustly taken from us. The tides of war are shifting, and the dawn of liberation draws near.

The kingdom, a relic of our past, has crumbled, and with it, the old order has been cast aside. We stand at the threshold of a new era, an era that promises a future grounded in the values of Liberty, Equality, and Fraternity. It is time to forge ahead, to build a Republic that embodies these principles and serves as a beacon of hope for all who yearn for a just and equitable society.

Our mission is clear: to liberate our land and to lay the foundation for a nation reborn. We are not merely fighting to reclaim territory; we are striving to establish a new identity, a republic where every voice is heard and every individual is valued. The struggle has been long, but it has also strengthened our resolve and united our purpose.

Let us move forward with courage and determination, comrades. The promise of freedom and justice lies within our grasp. Together, we will reclaim our country and build a future where the ideals of Liberty, Equality, and Fraternity are not just aspirations but the very essence of our Republic. Our time is now. Let us rise and lead our nation into a new era of hope and prosperity!

Don't hesitate to say what to change ! If you liked or not, give a review too ! Don't assault me by saying "It sucks", if it does suck for you, just tell me why ^^

Keywords : War, Resistance, Freedom, Occupation, Resistant, Warfare, Fictionnal, Conflict, Liberation
creator: Nicolo03
